theorem: representation-to-spectrum derivation of the 24-round repair count
claim: The selected screen-capacity repair cycle has m_rep=24.

branch.name: OPH realized observer-visible Standard Model product branch
conditions: no simple-GUT X/Y mixed gauge bosons

repair_grammar.name: spectrum-complete reversible adjoint repair grammar
repair_grammar.alphabet_rule: For each observer-visible compact-gauge adjoint generator a, include exactly two oriented primitive repair ticks a:+ and a:-.
repair_grammar.orientation_meaning: the two orientations are the action/coaction, write/verify, or ket/bra halves required by reversible overlap repair and record preservation
repair_grammar.tick_count_observable: rank of the active oriented adjoint support, equivalently the order of the cyclic scheduler on that support

spectral_object.name: cyclic repair clock on oriented adjoint support

negative_controls.name: unoriented product adjoint
negative_controls.reason: forgets the co-oriented verification half required by reversible record-preserving repair

negative_controls.name: minimal coupled carrier
negative_controls.reason: counts the matter-coupled carrier, not the adjoint repair spectrum

negative_controls.name: color-only doubled adjoint
negative_controls.reason: omits weak and hypercharge channels from the realized product branch

negative_controls.name: single-orientation SU(5) adjoint
negative_controls.reason: wrong support: includes X/Y mixed gauge bosons and lacks orientation doubling

negative_controls.name: doubled SU(5) adjoint
negative_controls.reason: wrong branch: contains X/Y channels excluded by the OPH product-group adjoint theorem

negative_controls.name: include graviton in compact-gauge repair support
negative_controls.reason: the graviton is the dynamical metric branch and fixes the radius/capacity chart, not an internal compact-gauge adjoint repair channel

used_inputs: OPH product-branch exclusion of extra U(1) and X/Y gauge bosons

closed_here: m_rep=2*dim(su(3)+su(2)+u(1))=24 on the realized product-gauge branch
the cyclic scheduler on the oriented adjoint support has spectral period 24
the global tick exponent specializes to -1/48
